title: rubus belonacanthus
intro: Rubus belonacanthus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a species of raspberry plant native to the Himalayas. It is a shrub-like plant with edible fruits and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus belonacanthus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially reducing the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and jams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
